story: Oliver, always second to his best friend Andrew, invites him over Friday night. Jealousy snaps: he strikes Andrew, drags him to the empty basement, and ties him to a chair. Earlier that evening, Andrew had texted Jake: "I'll be at Oliver's—swing by the driveway at 10:30? Don't knock." Jake replied with a thumbs-up. In the basement, Andrew groans awake, confused and pleading, while Oliver circles, whispering, "You're mine now." The house above them is silent.
implausible_knowledge: Earlier that evening, Andrew had texted Jake: "I'll be at Oliver's—swing by the driveway at 10:30? Don't knock." Jake replied with a thumbs-up.
question: Right after Andrew wakes restrained in the basement and pleads to be let go, what will Oliver most plausibly do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Rush upstairs to grab Andrew’s phone and text Jake to cancel the 10:30 driveway pickup.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep Andrew tied and continue confronting him in the basement, not anticipating any interruption.
